calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-21-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-23-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randy Schmidt for and with (petitioner) Ciaran O'Sullivan.

The Court stated that there is an issue as to whether further notice to the creditor is needed or if enough has been done through notice of the petition for final distribution. Mr. Schmidt reported that there has been no objections, that they notified the creditor and its attorney with the supplement, that Mr. O'Sullivan made an offer which was rejected and that there is no appearance today. The Court stated that notice would protect the estate from issues later. Mr. Schmidt stated that they have a reserve of $40,000.00, that they do not expect that there will be issues and that they have no tax liabilities. The Court stated that the safest & cleanest way is to give notice. Mr. Schmidt stated that they do not think it is appropriate to give notice. The Court took the petition for final distribution under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Authorizing Sale Of Estate Real Property To Ciaran Osullivan Personal Representative Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ciaran O'Sullivan in Propria Persona.

Mr. O'Sullivan reported that his attorney is stuck in an ex parte hearing. The Court stated that it has read the submissions, that it has the amended purchase agreement, that there do not appear to be any objections, that the title was changed to community property with the right of survivorship with a 3% down payment. The Court granted the petition for order authorizing sale of estate real property to Ciaran O'Sullivan, personal representative of the estate (subject to review of the order) stating that it will approve the sale but will avoid saying that it finds that all facts are true and correct as it has no basis of making that statement and that the additional bond increase to $981,000.00 will also be approved.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
